events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and record producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Lionel's Hits
angles.copy: Seventy-seven years young! Celebrate the legendary Lionel Richie's birthday with us by reliving some of his greatest hits. What's your ultimate Lionel track?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the iconic Cyndi Lauper! From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to 'Time After Time', her music defined a generation. What's your favourite Cyndi moment?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and record producer George Michael would have celebrated his 63rd birthday.

angles.name: Tribute to George
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music continues to inspire and move us. What's the George Michael song that means the most to you?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: Remembering MJ
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains unparalleled. What's your favourite Michael Jackson song or memory?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! Drummer for the most famous band in the world and a true icon. Send him some peace and love today!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May, best known as the lead guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: A huge happy 79th birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May! From Queen's anthems to his incredible guitar solos, he's a true rock legend. What's your favourite Brian May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer, songwriter, and actor Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the moves, the voice! Still rocking after all these years. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched: 45 Years of Music Television
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV's Legacy
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' It's safe to say radio survived, but what an era for music videos! What was your favourite music video growing up?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music. What's your go-to track from this absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 Years On
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing together nearly half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Woodstock Spirit
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for Woodstock – a legendary moment of peace, love, and music. What's your favourite performance from the festival?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost Elvis Presley. His legacy as the King of Rock and Roll lives on. What's the Elvis song that always gets you moving?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas, dying six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot on this day in 1996. A voice that defined a generation and whose impact is still felt today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi's Enduring Sound
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the music world lost Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks. What's your favourite song from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend, Chrissie Hynde! Her fierce attitude and incredible voice have given us so many classics. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for it Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in October 1975, four years after its album release.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: The First iPod Launched 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago today, Apple introduced the first iPod. '1,000 songs in your pocket' – it changed everything! What was the first album you loaded onto your iPod?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?
